title: Grok 4.5 Enters Beta with Unverified Opus Claims
summary: Grok 4.5 Enters Beta with Unverified Opus Claims | Awesome Agents On June 28, Elon Musk posted to X that Grok 4.5 is in private beta at SpaceX and Tesla, along with a claim that early internal evaluations put it close to - or potentially above - Anthropic's Claude Opus.
